fields.name: statusCode
fields.description: HTTP status code of the error response.

fields.name: timestamp
fields.description: Timestamp of when the error occurred.

fields.name: path
fields.description: The path where the error occurred.

fields.name: ctx
fields.description: Optional context object for additional error details.

fields.name: errorId
fields.description:
Optional unique identifier for the error, useful for tracking using Sentry and 
      New Relic, only available for 500.
